title: 100 Milk Chocolate Hearts - Silver foil Mothers Day Chocolates - Creamy Wedding Party Table Favours - Ideal for Parties, Birthdays, Anniversaries, Valentine's Day
features: Distinctive Chocolate Experience - Crafted from creamy milk chocolate, our chocolate hearts boast an amazing taste that will delight your guests. Wrapped in silver foil, these chocolates are a sight to behold and a delight to your tastebuds.

Perfect Wedding Favours - Our Silver Foil Wrapped Milk Chocolate Hearts are an excellent choice for wedding favours for guests. Packaged in beautiful silver foil, these chocolate hearts will add an elegant touch to your celebration.

All-Inclusive Indulgence - Our Silver Foil Chocolate Hearts cater to various dietary needs, being wholly vegetarian and gluten-free. They are the ideal chocolate' gift, allowing everyone at your event to savour the exceptional taste.

A Pack Full of Love -Each pack comes with 100 Silver Hearts. Weighing 6 grams each, these chocolate delights are abundant enough to cater for your wedding, party, anniversary, or Valentine's Day event.

Versatile Gift Option - Our Silver Foil Wrapped Milk Chocolate Hearts make a gorgeous wedding anniversary or hotel chocolates' love, making your celebration remarkable. Presented in bulk, they make a wonderful box of chocolate gifts.
